label: FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions with expandable accordion

test_data.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
test_data.subheading: Everything you need to know about VibeCMS

items.question: How fast is VibeCMS?
items.answer: VibeCMS is optimized for sub-50ms time to first byte (TTFB). Our rendering pipeline uses optimized database queries, template caching, and minimal overhead to deliver pages as fast as possible.

items.question: Can I use my own design?
items.answer: Absolutely! VibeCMS uses a powerful theme system with CSS custom properties. You can create your own theme from scratch or customize the default theme by changing a few CSS variables.

items.question: Does it support multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes, VibeCMS has built-in multi-language support. You can create content, menus, and layouts in any language, with automatic language detection and URL prefixing.

items.question: How do I extend VibeCMS?
items.answer: VibeCMS supports zero-rebuild extensions through Tengo scripts. You can add custom logic, hooks, and integrations without recompiling the application.

items.question: Is there an API?
items.answer: Yes, VibeCMS provides a full REST API for content management, user administration, and site configuration. The admin UI is built entirely on this API.
